scene: Stan slumped in an airplane seat with the seatbelt on, the little window showing his own bedroom, flat grey plane interior filling the tall frame, big black caps JET LAG.
An alarm clock yanking a sleepy Stan up early by a string, a weekday row behind, flat beige filling the tall frame, big black caps ALARM ALL WEEK.
Weekend Stan sleeping in late and happy, sun high in the window, flat warm yellow filling the tall frame, big black caps SLEEP IN.
A simple map with a plane flying west then east in a loop over Stan's tiny house, red arrows, flat green map filling the tall frame, big black caps WEST, THEN EAST.
Three simple stick people stacked, two of them yawning, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps 2 IN 3.
